catalog_content:
Item Name: Tea Zone 7 lbs Brown Sugar Popping Pearls for Boba tea Beverages, Sweets, Ice Cream Topping (B2066)
Bullet Point 1: Effortlessly Delicious: Perfect for busy quick-service restaurants, our popping pearls require no prep, no cooking, just pure popping fun! Simply add them straight from the jar to any beverage for an instant flavor and texture upgrade.
Bullet Point 2: A Burst of Color and Taste: These popping pearls boast a brown color, echoing the vibrant hue of fresh brown sugar flavor. Bite into them to experience a delightful explosion of sweet, tangy brown sugar flavor that complements a variety of drinks.
Bullet Point 3: Liven Up Your Menu: From smoothies and iced teas to frozen yogurt and cocktails, our Flavored Popping Pearls add a playful and delicious element to any beverage.
Bullet Point 4: Delicious Flavor: Bite into them to experience a delightful explosion of sweet, tangy raspberry flavor that complements a variety of drinks. The juicy burst adds a surprising and delightful textural element to every sip.
Bullet Point 5: Dietary Friendly: Free from nuts, dairy, gluten, and gelatin, making them a perfect choice for people with allergies and dietary restrictions. Expand your customer base!
Product Description: Indulge your taste buds with a symphony of flavor in every sip with our Brown Sugar Popping Pearls! Imagine this: biting into a tiny sphere that releases a wave of rich, caramelized brown sugar. The sweetness isn't one-dimensional, it has a depth that comes from slow simmering and hints of buttery toffee. These bite-sized pearls aren't just an add-in, they're a luxurious flavor explosion that elevates any beverage to a decadent treat. Use them in bubble tea, iced coffees, milkshakes, smoothies, and more! Versatile and delicious for any creation!
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Mid-range specialty ingredient designed for beverage customization. Plastic container with resealable lid indicates practicality for commercial use. Bulk 7 lb size suggests value for restaurants or high-volume consumers. No premium or organic claims, but gluten-free and allergy-friendly positioning may justify slightly higher price than standard toppings.

Item Name: Amoretti - Premium Prickly Pear Syrup, 94 Servings Per Bottle (750 ml), with Pump for Flavoring Coffees, Cocktails, and other Beverages, Gluten Free, GMO/GEO Free, Preservative Free Bullet Point 1: INCREDIBLE VERSATILITY: Our premium syrups are ideal for flavoring coffee, cocktails, sodas, teas, iced teas, milkshakes, desserts, and so much more. Bullet Point 2: SPECIFICATIONS: No artificial flavors, no preservatives, no artificial sweeteners, gluten-free, GMO/GEO free, and Kosher Pareve. Bullet Point 3: LOWEST COST PER SERVING & BEST VALUE: Our super-concentrated premium syrups have over 3x the number of servings than other syrups on the market. Bullet Point 4: HIGHEST QUALITY: We use only the finest and freshest ingredients to deliver delicious natural flavors in each pump. Bullet Point 5: SHELF-STABLE & CONVENIENT: Stays fresh even after opening, no refrigeration needed. Includes a free pump for effortless pouring. Product Description:

At Amoretti, we craft our Premium Syrups with the finest and freshest ingredients, using proprietary techniques to deliver exceptional natural flavor. Whether you're creating gourmet beverages like coffee, cappuccinos, lattes, teas, milkshakes, cocktails, or mocktails, our syrups are the perfect way to elevate your creations. They’re also ideal for adding a flavorful swirl to ice cream or gelato and make a delectable topping for desserts, waffles, and more. Discover the difference premium ingredients make in every pour!!

Made with real fruit flavors, our preservative-free, non-GMO, vegan, and Kosher Pareve formula guarantees a premium taste experience in every sip. Whether you're crafting signature cocktails, refreshing spritzers, or bold-flavored mocktails, Amoretti makes it easy to create vibrant, consistent flavors with every pump.

With 94 servings per 750 ml bottle, Amoretti offers unmatched value and a low-cost-per-serving compared to other brands. Plus, it's shelf-stable, meaning it stays fresh even after opening—no refrigeration required!

Proudly handcrafted in Southern California, Amoretti Beverage Infusions are the ultimate choice for home bartenders, cafés, restaurants, and professional mixologists. Experience the perfect balance of sweet and tart with Amoretti Beverage Infusion—your go-to flavor booster for every drink!

Value: 25.4 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Premium gourmet syrup with high-quality, natural ingredients and a focus on versatility for beverages and desserts. The brand emphasizes low cost per serving and shelf stability, positioning it as a value-driven premium product. Glass bottle with a pump dispenser enhances convenience and perceived quality.
